title: Simple Project Gantt Chart Creator
scenario: Create a simple project Gantt chart creator that takes in a project's tasks, dependencies, and deadlines. The tool should output a formatted Gantt chart with the tasks, dependencies, and deadlines. Ensure the format meets standard Gantt chart requirements.
constraints: Must be under 200 pixels in height
Must use standard Gantt chart formatting

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated image adheres to the constraints.
Check if the tasks, dependencies, and deadlines are included in the output.
Check if the generated image is a valid Gantt chart.
